    C

    Category - Class in hr.java.financemanagementsystem.model
    Represents a transaction category created by a user.

    Builder for creating Category instances.
    CategoryDatabaseRepository - Class in hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database
    Repository for managing Category data in the database.

    Handles business logic for category management.

    Thrown when category data fails validation.
